<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0">
<title>What's Really Causing Your Dark Spots? | TIAM</title>
<style>
  @font-face {
    font-family: 'Pretendard';
    src: local('Pretendard');
  }
  :root {
    --primary: #1456f0;
    --primary2: #3b82f6;
    --primary3: #60a5fa;
    --accent: #FFFE67;
    --text: #1a1a2e;
    --muted: #6b7280;
    --bg: #f7f8fc;
    --white: #ffffff;
  }
  * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  body {
    font-family: 'Pretendard', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .app {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 420px;
    min-height: 100vh;
    background: var(--white);
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(20,86,240,0.08);
  }

  /* Progress bar */
  .progress-wrap {
    height: 5px;
    background: #eef0fa;
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 10;
  }
  .progress-bar {
    height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--primary), var(--primary3));
    width: 0%;
    transition: width 0.4s ease;
  }

  .screen {
    flex: 1;
    display: none;
    flex-direction: column;
    padding: 32px 24px 40px;
    animation: fadeIn 0.4s ease;
  }
  .screen.active { display: flex; }
  @keyframes fadeIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  /* Intro */
  .logo {
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .logo img {
    height: 16px;
    width: auto;
    display: block;
  }
  .intro-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--accent);
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 6px 12px;
    border-radius: 100px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    width: fit-content;
  }
  h1.title {
    font-size: 26px;
    font-weight: 800;
    line-height: 1.4;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
  p.desc {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--muted);
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
  }
  .intro-visual {
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 1.4;
    border-radius: 20px;
    background: var(--bg);
    margin-bottom: 28px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .intro-visual img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
  }
  .intro-visual .icon-dots {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 20px; left: 20px;
    font-size: 34px;
  }

  .meta-row {
    display: flex;
    gap: 16px;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
  }
  .meta-item {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--muted);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
  }
  .meta-item .dot {
    width: 6px; height: 6px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--primary3);
  }

  /* Buttons */
  .btn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 16px;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 14px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: transform 0.15s ease, opacity 0.15s ease;
    text-decoration: none;
    display: block;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .btn:active { transform: scale(0.98); }
  .btn-primary {
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--primary), var(--primary2));
    color: var(--white);
    margin-top: auto;
  }
  .btn-outline {
    background: var(--white);
    color: var(--primary);
    border: 1.5px solid var(--primary3);
    margin-top: 12px;
  }

  /* Question screen */
  .q-count {
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--primary);
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }
  .q-text {
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 800;
    line-height: 1.4;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .options {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 10px;
    flex: 1;
  }
  .option {
    background: var(--bg);
    border: 1.5px solid transparent;
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 16px 18px;
    font-size: 14.5px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text);
    cursor: pointer;
    text-align: left;
    transition: all 0.15s ease;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
  }
  .option:hover {
    border-color: var(--primary3);
    background: #eef2ff;
  }
  .option .emoji {
    font-size: 20px;
  }
  .back-link {
    margin-top: 20px;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--muted);
    text-align: center;
    cursor: pointer;
    text-decoration: underline;
  }

  /* Loading */
  #screen-loading {
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .spinner {
    width: 44px; height: 44px;
    border: 3px solid #eef0fa;
    border-top-color: var(--primary);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: spin 0.9s linear infinite;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
  .loading-text {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--muted);
    font-weight: 600;
  }

  /* Result screen */
  .result-tag {
    display: inline-block;
    background: var(--accent);
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 800;
    padding: 6px 14px;
    border-radius: 100px;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    width: fit-content;
  }
  .result-title {
    font-size: 24px;
    font-weight: 800;
    line-height: 1.4;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
  }
  .result-sub {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-bottom: 22px;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }
  .result-visual {
    width: 100%;
    height: 160px;
    border-radius: 18px;
    margin-bottom: 22px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 56px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .result-visual img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
  }
  .card {
    background: var(--bg);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 18px 20px;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .card-label {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--primary);
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .card-body {
    font-size: 13.5px;
    line-height: 1.7;
    color: var(--text);
  }
  .product-card {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary) 0%, var(--primary2) 100%);
    color: var(--white);
    border-radius: 18px;
    padding: 22px 20px;
    margin: 6px 0 20px;
  }
  .product-card .plabel {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    opacity: 0.85;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .product-card .pname {
    font-size: 17px;
    font-weight: 800;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .product-card .pdesc {
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    opacity: 0.95;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
  }
  .product-card .pnote {
    font-size: 11px;
    opacity: 0.75;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }
  .share-row {
    display: flex;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .share-row .btn { margin-top: 0; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="app">
  <div class="progress-wrap"><div class="progress-bar" id="progressBar"></div></div>

  <!-- Intro -->
  <div class="screen active" id="screen-intro">
    <div class="logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="TIAM"></div>
    <div class="intro-badge">30-SECOND QUIZ</div>
    <h1 class="title">What's really<br>causing your dark spots?</h1>
    <p class="desc">Dark spots don't all come from the same place. Sun exposure? Acne marks? Something else? Answer 5 quick questions to find out your dark spot type.</p>
    <div class="intro-visual"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Different skin tones, different dark spot causes"></div>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="startQuiz()">Start the Quiz</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Questions injected here -->
  <div id="questions-container"></div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="screen" id="screen-loading">
    <div class="spinner"></div>
    <div class="loading-text">Analyzing your answers...</div>
  </div>

  <!-- Result -->
  <div class="screen" id="screen-result">
    <div id="resultContent"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const questions = [
  {
    text: "Where do your dark spots mostly show up?",
    options: [
      { emoji: "☀️", label: "Scattered brown spots on cheeks", scores: { uv: 2 } },
      { emoji: "😣", label: "Reddish-brown marks clustered on chin/mouth area", scores: { pih: 2 } },
      { emoji: "🌫️", label: "Overall dull, uneven tone across the face", scores: { turnover: 2 } },
      { emoji: "🤔", label: "Not sure, a bit of everything", scores: { mixed: 2 } }
    ]
  },
  {
    text: "How much sun exposure do you typically get?",
    options: [
      { emoji: "🏃", label: "Outdoors almost every day", scores: { uv: 2 } },
      { emoji: "🚗", label: "Some, mostly commuting or errands", scores: { uv: 1, mixed: 1 } },
      { emoji: "🏠", label: "Mostly indoors, low exposure", scores: { pih: 1, turnover: 1 } },
      { emoji: "🧴", label: "Low exposure, but I skip sunscreen often", scores: { turnover: 1, mixed: 1 } }
    ]
  },
  {
    text: "Do marks linger after a breakout?",
    options: [
      { emoji: "🔴", label: "Yes, almost every time", scores: { pih: 2 } },
      { emoji: "🟡", label: "Sometimes, only with bad breakouts", scores: { pih: 1, mixed: 1 } },
      { emoji: "⚪️", label: "Not much acne, but I still have dark spots", scores: { uv: 1, turnover: 1 } },
      { emoji: "✅", label: "Rarely get breakouts or marks", scores: { turnover: 1 } }
    ]
  },
  {
    text: "What do your dark spots look like?",
    options: [
      { emoji: "🟤", label: "Dark with sharp, defined edges", scores: { uv: 2 } },
      { emoji: "🩷", label: "Reddish and soft-edged", scores: { pih: 2 } },
      { emoji: "🌥️", label: "Light but spread out, making skin look dull", scores: { turnover: 2 } },
      { emoji: "🎨", label: "Mixed colors and locations", scores: { mixed: 2 } }
    ]
  },
  {
    text: "When did your dark spots noticeably get worse?",
    options: [
      { emoji: "🌞", label: "After summer or lots of outdoor time", scores: { uv: 2 } },
      { emoji: "😖", label: "After a stressful period or breakout", scores: { pih: 2 } },
      { emoji: "⏳", label: "Gradually over time, no clear trigger", scores: { turnover: 2 } },
      { emoji: "❓", label: "Not sure what triggered it", scores: { mixed: 1 } }
    ]
  }
];

const results = {
  uv: {
    tag: "TYPE 1",
    emoji: "☀️",
    gradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #1456f0, #60a5fa)",
    image: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
    title: "Sun-Induced Pigmentation",
    sub: "Your dark spots come from years of sun exposure",
    cause: "Cumulative UV exposure has boosted melanin production, leaving well-defined brown spots mostly on the cheeks. Sun exposure can also deepen existing spots over time, so protection matters more than treatment here.",
    tip: "Apply a generous amount of sunscreen daily and reapply every 2–3 hours outdoors. Follow up with soothing care after extended sun exposure."
  },
  pih: {
    tag: "TYPE 2",
    emoji: "😣",
    gradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #3b82f6, #FFFE67)",
    image: "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
    title: "Post-Breakout Marks (PIH)",
    sub: "Your dark spots are leftover marks from breakouts",
    cause: "This type comes from post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation (PIH) — marks left behind after a breakout heals. They tend to be reddish-brown with soft edges, and new breakouts can add more marks over time.",
    tip: "Focus on a gentle routine that calms breakouts without irritating skin, paired with consistent care to help marks fade over time."
  },
  turnover: {
    tag: "TYPE 3",
    emoji: "🌫️",
    gradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #60a5fa, #1456f0)",
    title: "Slow Skin Turnover",
    sub: "A slower renewal cycle is behind your dull tone",
    cause: "When skin's natural renewal cycle slows down, old skin cells and pigment linger on the surface — showing up less as distinct spots and more as an overall dull, uneven tone. This tends to build up gradually with age and environment.",
    tip: "Support gentle exfoliation alongside a consistent brightening routine to help your skin's renewal rhythm keep up."
  },
  mixed: {
    tag: "TYPE 4",
    emoji: "🎨",
    gradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #1456f0, #3b82f6, #FFFE67)",
    title: "Mixed Causes",
    sub: "A combination of factors is at play",
    cause: "Your dark spots don't trace back to just one cause — sun exposure, breakout marks, and slower turnover may all be contributing. With multiple factors involved, it's best to cover your bases rather than target just one.",
    tip: "Keep the fundamentals consistent: daily sunscreen, gentle cleansing, and a steady brightening routine, rather than chasing one specific fix."
  }
};

const answers = { uv: 0, pih: 0, turnover: 0, mixed: 0 };
let currentQ = 0;
const totalSteps = questions.length + 1; // +1 for intro

function buildQuestions() {
  const container = document.getElementById('questions-container');
  questions.forEach((q, idx) => {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.className = 'screen';
    div.id = 'screen-q' + idx;
    div.innerHTML = `
      <div class="q-count">Q${idx + 1} / ${questions.length}</div>
      <div class="q-text">${q.text}</div>
      <div class="options">
        ${q.options.map((opt, oIdx) => `
          <div class="option" onclick="selectOption(${idx}, ${oIdx})">
            <span class="emoji">${opt.emoji}</span>
            <span>${opt.label}</span>
          </div>
        `).join('')}
      </div>
      ${idx > 0 ? '<div class="back-link" onclick="goBack(' + idx + ')">Back to previous question</div>' : ''}
    `;
    container.appendChild(div);
  });
}
buildQuestions();

function updateProgress(step) {
  const pct = (step / totalSteps) * 100;
  document.getElementById('progressBar').style.width = pct + '%';
}

function showScreen(id) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
}

function startQuiz() {
  currentQ = 0;
  showScreen('screen-q0');
  updateProgress(1);
}

function selectOption(qIdx, oIdx) {
  const scores = questions[qIdx].options[oIdx].scores;
  for (const key in scores) {
    answers[key] += scores[key];
  }
  if (qIdx < questions.length - 1) {
    currentQ = qIdx + 1;
    showScreen('screen-q' + currentQ);
    updateProgress(qIdx + 2);
  } else {
    updateProgress(totalSteps);
    showLoadingThenResult();
  }
}

function goBack(qIdx) {
  currentQ = qIdx - 1;
  showScreen('screen-q' + currentQ);
  updateProgress(currentQ + 1);
}

function showLoadingThenResult() {
  showScreen('screen-loading');
  setTimeout(() => {
    renderResult();
    showScreen('screen-result');
  }, 900);
}

function getTopResult() {
  let topKey = 'mixed';
  let topScore = -1;
  for (const key in answers) {
    if (answers[key] > topScore) {
      topScore = answers[key];
      topKey = key;
    }
  }
  return topKey;
}

function renderResult() {
  const key = getTopResult();
  const r = results[key];
  const html = `
    <div class="result-tag">${r.tag}</div>
    <div class="result-title">${r.title}</div>
    <div class="result-sub">${r.sub}</div>
    <div class="result-visual" style="${r.image ? '' : 'background:' + r.gradient}">${r.image ? '<img src="' + r.image + '" alt="' + r.title + '">' : r.emoji}</div>

    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-label">WHY THIS HAPPENS</div>
      <div class="card-body">${r.cause}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-label">HOW TO CARE FOR IT</div>
      <div class="card-body">${r.tip}</div>
    </div>

    <div class="product-card">
      <div class="plabel">TIAM PICK</div>
      <div class="pname">Vita B3 Source</div>
      <div class="pdesc">A niacinamide-based serum that helps dark spots and hyperpigmentation appear lighter with consistent use, 3–4 times a week. No need to apply twice a day — an easy addition to any routine.</div>
      <div class="pnote">* Results may vary by individual and are based on use 3–4 times per week.</div>
    </div>

    <div class="share-row">
      <button class="btn btn-outline" onclick="restartQuiz()" style="flex:1;">Retake the Quiz</button>
    </div>
    <a class="btn btn-primary" href="https://www.amazon.com/TIAM-Niacinamide-Vitamin-Arbutin-Hyperpigmentation/dp/B07MJ3PJ2N?ref_=ast_sto_dp" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Shop Vita B3 Source</a>
  `;
  document.getElementById('resultContent').innerHTML = html;
}

function restartQuiz() {
  for (const key in answers) answers[key] = 0;
  currentQ = 0;
  showScreen('screen-intro');
  updateProgress(0);
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
